Agent2 Round 1: I agree with agent1's assessment. The Helsinki Declaration indeed sets global standards for ethical conduct in biomedical research involving human subjects. Its widespread adoption ensures consistency across different countries and institutions regarding how researchers should handle participants' rights and well-being.
